'''zhadhata''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:iffiness|iffiness]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-dh-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:iffiness|iffiness]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zhadhata
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhædhætæth|zhædhætæth]] || [[word:zhædhætæj|zhædhætæj]] || [[word:zhædhætæsh|zhædhætæsh]] || [[word:zhædhætæ|zhædhætæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhadhadhatath|zhadhadhatath]] || [[word:zhadhadhataj|zhadhadhataj]] || [[word:zhadhadhatash|zhadhadhatash]] || [[word:zhadhadhata|zhadhadhata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhadhatath|zhadhatath]] || [[word:zhadhataj|zhadhataj]] || [[word:zhadhatash|zhadhatash]] || [[word:zhadhata|zhadhata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhadhaftath|zhadhaftath]] || [[word:zhadhaftaj|zhadhaftaj]] || [[word:zhadhaftash|zhadhaftash]] || [[word:zhadhaftaf|zhadhaftaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhadhatatha|zhadhatatha]] || [[word:zhadhataja|zhadhataja]] || [[word:zhadhatasha|zhadhatasha]] || [[word:zhadhataka|zhadhataka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhadhatath|zhadhatath]] || [[word:zhadhataj|zhadhataj]] || [[word:zhadhatash|zhadhatash]] || [[word:zhadhata|zhadhata]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhadhatathal|zhadhatathal]] || [[word:zhadhatajal|zhadhatajal]] || [[word:zhadhatashal|zhadhatashal]] || [[word:zhadhatakal|zhadhatakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhadhatathatha|zhadhatathatha]] || [[word:zhadhatajaja|zhadhatajaja]] || [[word:zhadhatashasha|zhadhatashasha]] || [[word:zhadhataka|zhadhataka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhadhatathan|zhadhatathan]] || [[word:zhadhatajan|zhadhatajan]] || [[word:zhadhatashan|zhadhatashan]] || [[word:zhadhatakan|zhadhatakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhadhatathaoro|zhadhatathaoro]] || [[word:zhadhatajaoro|zhadhatajaoro]] || [[word:zhadhatashaoro|zhadhatashaoro]] || [[word:zhadhatakaoro|zhadhatakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
